name: Batter to Use for Deep Frying Foods
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour, baking powder, cornstarch, salt, and sugar in a bowl.
2. Gradually add water and oil while stirring continuously until all lumps are dissolved.
3. Preheat the oil for deep frying to the appropriate temperature for the food being cooked.
4. Dry fish or vegetables with a paper towel.
5. Dip each piece into the batter.
6. Place pieces in the hot oil one at a time, allowing enough space between them to prevent collisions as the batter sets quickly.
7. Cook until the batter turns golden brown.
8. Remove from the oil using a paper towel and serve immediately.
